creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Hello, and thanks for your interest.
You're the first I've heard from anyone regarding
databases/gnats. So I wasn't even sure anyone was
still using it.
I'll take a look, and see what'll be involved.
If it's not too intensive, I can probably have
something for you in a week, or so. But if it
turns out to be anything bigger. I'm afraid it'll
be awhile. As my dev box is borked ATM. So I'm
looking at new hardware to build a replacement.

Thanks again. I'll report back! If you come up with
anything before I do, please post it here. Feel
free to ping me, if you think I've taken too long. :)

All the best.

--Chris
